title: Anthropic’s long-sidelined Fable 5 is greenlit to return
author: Hayden Field
raw_description: After weeks of negotiating with the Trump administration, Anthropic is finally going to be able to bring Claude Fable 5 back online. In a post on X, Anthropic said it plans to begin restoring access Wednesday to users globally on Claude platforms, and that the company would re-enable access on AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft […]
summary: Anthropic与特朗普政府谈判后，获准恢复Claude Fable 5服务，将逐步在全球Claude平台及AWS、Google Cloud、Microsoft等云服务上重新上线。
analysis_note: 内容为模型恢复上线的商业新闻，技术深度低，但涉及重要AI公司动态，相关性中等。
